trigger: LLM serialized structured output via json.dumps() without considering non-serializable types in the data model
symptom: TypeError: Object of type datetime is not JSON serializable — crashes at runtime when payload includes dates or custom objects
notes: LLMs treat json.dumps() as universally applicable. Any codebase with datetime, UUID, Decimal, numpy types, or Pydantic models will hit this. Always audit json.dumps() calls for a default= encoder.
